column1: This list includes legendary, biblical, and historical battles; some (e.g., Jericho, Ai) are debated archaeologically but are central to Jewish tradition.
Major neighbors: Egyptians, Canaanites, Amorites, Moabites, Ammonites, Philistines, Arameans, Assyrians, Babylonians, Persians, Greeks, Seleucids, Romans.
Minor and regional conflicts (e.g., with Edom, Ammon, Midian, Amalek, etc.) are numerous in the biblical period and Judges’ era.
The table covers from the Hyksos era through the Bar Kokhba revolt, the main ancient period of Jewish military history.
If you need a more granular breakdown (e.g., every battle in Judges or Kings), or a focus on a specific era, let me know!
